feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Event Mesh
feed.subtitle: SAP Event Mesh Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RAISE_EVENT_BD
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP S/4HANA, the method IF_SD_BIL_EVENT_HANDLING~RAISE_EVENT_BD of the class CL_SD_BIL_EVENT_HANDLING is no longer used in the standard billing document creation process. Has it been replaced by another method?

 

Tanks,

entry.title: When will CALM supports SAP Integration Suite (Event Mesh) in data center eu10?
entry.content:
Following the documentation it is said that "At the moment only the following SAP Integration Suite (Event Mesh) data centers are supported: eu12, eu13, eu21, jp20, us30, us31".
Are there any plans that datacenter "eu10" will be supported soon?

Thanks for an information and best regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Error in Equipment Replication from S4HANA to SAP Sales Cloud
entry.content:
We currently have a requirement to replicate Equipment from SAP S4Hana to SAP Sales Cloud version2. We have setup event mesh default plan in btp , and create channel via service key in Tcode /o/IWXBE/CONFIG. But during activation the channel there is error displayed “ AMQP connection setup error for channel 'S4HANANEVENTMESH'”.

Kindly advise on the required configuration to enable activation channel in S4Hana

note : we are using cloud connector

entry.title: RAP events feasibility after advance event mesh available for client
entry.content: We have implemented Restful application programming (RAP) for delivery business objects and it is working as expected. Now AEM (Advance event mesh) will be available in client landscape. So we need to know what kind of retrofitting we need to do when the RAP solution is working with AEM. Please suggest some sap links which can be useful to understand the basic of advance event mesh.

entry.title: Integration Suite Event Mesh - Management API
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have noticed that Integration Suite Event Mesh is now offering an API that was previously only available for Standalone Event Mesh: the EM Management API.

Standalone EM APIs

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPEventMeshDefaultPlan/rest

This API is leveraged by SAP CALM for health monitoring of the Integration Suite broker.

Unfortunately, SAP has kept the details to themselves, and the API Business Hub does not show the new API for Integration Suite.

Integration Suite Event Mesh API

https://api.sap.com/package/EventMeshinSAPIntegrationSuite/rest

In the API Business Hub, there are no details about the Management API being leveraged by SAP CALM, but we know it is there.

We have not been able to determine the BasePath for this API yet, as it has changed compared to the Standalone version (https://XXX:YYYY/hub/rest/api/v1/management/...).

Has anyone found the BasePath for this API?

Best regards,
Mikel

entry.title: Events from SuccessFactors to SAP Event Mesh (EMIS)
entry.content:
Dear Community

Has anyone successfully connected SAP Event Mesh (EMIS) with SuccessFactors using Intelligent Service Center?

I've encountered an issue with URL encoding of the topic/queue component in the REST messaging protocol endpoint URL, which occurs in both Integration Center (Custom Integration) and Event Connector. The proper URL construction for REST endpoints is documented here: https://help.sap.com/docs/event-mesh/event-mesh/use-rest-apis-to-send-and-receive-messages

Here's what I'm experiencing:

  • Event Connector: The URL is decoded prematurely during editing of the endpoint URL field
  • Integration Center: The URL is decoded at runtime, which is visible in the error logs

Both approaches fail with a 404 error (URL not found). This behavior is consistent with what happens when sending a non-URL-encoded queue/topic component via Bruno/Postman—also resulting in a 404 error.

This problem is referenced in SAP's knowledge base, but no solution has been provided: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3120396

best regards,

Mateusz

entry.title: Topic filtering in advanced event mesh
entry.content:
Hi 

We receive thousands of events per hour from external partner and it is received by Cloud Integration. Cloud Integration is sending these events to AEM. The events need to be distributed over 2 queues (1 queue has replay function and the otherone does not need a replay).

Topic that is being used now is: {partnerfunction}/{partner}/{status}. This is constructed in the AEM receiver channel.

We have e.g. 2 partner functions / 10 partners / 4 statuses

What is the best way to create something like this

Queue 1 --> both partner functions / 4 partners / 3 statuses

Queue2 --> both partner functions / other 6 partners / same 3 statuses

status4 is not being used at this moment.

Do I need to create subscriptions in the queues per combination or are there other options?

I see that wildcards can be used ... but is it also possible to exclude data?

e.g. I want all statuses except status4 

e.g. in queue 2 I want all other partners then those configured queue 1.

Best regards

Ron

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh
entry.content:
I am having an SAP Trail Account I want to access the SAP Event Mesh and create a small task, which will help me understand how the event mesh actually works, but I don't think trail accounts have the Event Mesh capability right?

I think event mesh was included in the trail account until last year or so, but right now I don't think trail accounts include event mesh service anymore right?

Please help me clarify this doubt, if I can access SAP's event mesh service on trail accounts or not

entry.title: Producer Event Mesh IFlow
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like for your opinion regarding designing producer's iflow for asynchronous data publishing and consumption. 
The general idea is to have integration flow that will iterate every 15 minutes over the list of datacenters and query Prometheus logs for every datacenter and then publish the data to the event mesh queue. That would be the producer iflow. Then, the consumer iflow would use the event mesh queue as the sender and push the messages to the FAST API application. 

So far I have been focusing on the producer design. It has the following steps:
1. Timer (trigger every 15 minutes)
2. Content Modifier (body with the landscape list)
3. Groovy script that reads the list
4. Iterator splitter (sequentially processing each landscape from the list)
5. Query Prometheus for each landscape id and build the topic property corresponding to the current landscape
6. Request Reply from the query
7. Publish the message to the event mesh queue
8. AMQP receiver adapter to connect to the queue
I would like your humble opinion on this design. I tested it and it works fine, the messages arrive to the queue and I can use Postman or Bruno to consume them. 
This is the setup with one queue and multiple topic subscriptions within the queue corresponding to each landscape id.
What do you think of this setup? I am using SAP Event Mesh and average message size can be from 2-5 MB depending on the size of the datacenter.

Thank you!

entry.title: IDocs vs Event-Driven Integration in SAP
entry.content: We are currently using IDocs for system integration in SAP and are exploring the possibility of moving to an event-driven architecture using SAP Event Mesh. How can IDocs be replaced with events in such a scenario, and what are the recommended best practices for implementing event-driven integration in SAP?

entry.title: Sharepoint Integration with SAP ECC using Event Broker
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Asking for possibility and best practice..

Could we integrate Sharepoint 2017 workflow with SAP ECC using Event Broker like Solace/Kafka plus custom apps like python etc?

Someone has experience on this kind of use case?

Thank you!

entry.title: Event Mesh Access via Postman
entry.content:
Team,

What are the best practices for accessing an Event Mesh queue via postman ?

Getting 403 Error.

Does Service key  need a scope ?

What are roles that needs to be assigned?

entry.title: Issue with Monitoring SAP Event Mesh in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hallo Everyone, 
I would like to monitor SAP Event Mesh in Cloud ALM. Currently, I am able to see all the Event Mesh systems that we have subscribed to in SAP BTP under Landscape Management in Cloud ALM.

However, when I attempt to add an endpoint for Event Mesh, I receive the following message:
“The endpoint creation is not required for SAP Event Mesh, as none of the SAP Cloud ALM use cases requires an endpoint.”

 

In the Health Monitoring section, when I add the service to scope, there is no option to proceed further, and no additional information related to Event Mesh is displayed.

I have already enabled data collection, but for over a month now, no data has been collected. The system shows the following error message:
“Data is outdated. Data collection turned OFF.”


Could you please assist in understanding:

  • Whether SAP Event Mesh monitoring is fully supported in Cloud ALM
  • If any additional configuration steps are required to enable data collection
  • Why the data collection remains turned off despite being enabled

I would appreciate any guidance or suggestions you can provide.

Thank you in Advance. 

Kind regards, 
Venkata Nagendra Reddy Vardhireddy 

 

SAP Cloud ALM SAP Event Mesh SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment

entry.title: How to change message status from RETRY to FAILED when using Event Mesh via AMQP sender adpater in C
entry.content:
Hello,

I have developed an integration flow in CPI that consumes the message from a queue created in Event Mesh (in configure section). In my main queue, I have set parameters as below -

and also, created a DMQ with config as below -

Into my iflow, i have used sender channel as AMQP adapter, and set below retry parameters -

Here I was testing by sending a test message via postman for failed scenario. When I trigger the message, it is picked by AMQP adapter, executed 5 times as per above setting. But at the end of the processing the final message status in CPI is set as RETRY instead of FAILED.

Please guide if any specific configuration is required here.  My requirement is to set the end message if error then final status should be FAILED or REJECTED. And also set some delay in retry without using any other retry mechanism like JMS/Datastore, etc. 

Thanks & Regards,

Himani Patil

entry.title: How to Debug the Event Consumption class in SAP BTP ABAP system for an event in Event Mesh ?
entry.content:
Hi All , 

How can i debug the event consumption class in ADT ??

Basically i am trying to consume an event in SAP BTP ABAP system . i have done the necessary objects following this Event Consumption in SAP BTP ABAP   .

1-> Event Consumption Model in SAP BTP ABAP system ( via ADT ) 
2-> Communication Arrangement , Scenario  .

for ex -My IB Communication user is CC00000012 (EVENT_CONSUMER) linked to communication systems for IB services for the Comm arrangement of EventMesh to SAP BTP system based on the custom Communication Scenario . ( Step 9) .

While testing  , i see the event is consumed successfully , however i dont see this Communication user available in F4 help for User External Debugger settings in ADT . I found in ADT ,the F4 help is limited to Dialog user . 

 

Is there any way to debug the event consumption class ?

Thank You .

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Event Mesh - Events can be published in testing but can't be consumed
entry.content:
Hi,

I am configuring SAP Event Mesh in Integration Suite.
End goal is create a communication channel in S4HANA on premise system , trigger events and consume the events in the integration suite.

I have the following config in place.
Created a SAP Integration Suite Event Mesh instance and a key.

Created a queue for the message-client.

Subscribed topics to the queue.

When I am testing this, the events are published but they aren't available for consumption:

Event-driven architecture SAP Event Mesh SAP Integration Suite 

Has anyone experienced this issue?

entry.title: Missing standard Business Event for Credit Management (Credit Limit for BPs) in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We are currently designing a solution to replicate Credit changes in the Business Partners.

The Requirement: We need to trigger an asynchronous event whenever a Business Partner's credit data is updated in SAP Credit Management (FSCM) — for instance, when a credit limit is changed, or the exposure/risk category is updated the external sytem must be notified in near real-time to block or release sales orders accordingly.

While looking into the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, we noticed that there is no standard event for Credit Management. The standard  BusinessPartner.Changed event does not reliably or specifically cover changes happening exclusively within the FSCM credit segments. We were looking for something along the lines of CreditDataChanged or CreditLimit.Changed, but it does not seem to exist.

My Questions:

  1. Is there any standard Event Enablement topic natively available for SAP Credit Management that we might have missed?

  2. Is utilizing a BAdI to publish custom events to the Event Mesh still the best practice/officially recommended approach for this specific scenario?

Any insights or architectural recommendations would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Configurations steps for Enterprise event enablement and Event Mesh for outbound
entry.content:
Hi,

I wish to know if anyone here can share me configuration steps for Enterprise Event Enablement along with Event Mesh and SAP BTP for On Premise HANA system. I am not looking for Event Addons. I have seen many blogs here which talks about this but i could not find the one which provides me complete steps. 

we are planning to send outbound events for SAP FI Park documents. I also wish to know if this topic (SAP FI Park Document) not existing in standard topic, how can i create a custom topic and event for the same.

We are currently on S4HANA on Premise FPS01 2023. Please share me details.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Extending S/4HANA Standard Event Header with SalesOrderType (AUART) for Event Mesh routing
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am working on an event-driven architecture using SAP S/4HANA and SAP Advanced Event Mesh and need some guidance on event extensibility -- unfortunately I did not find many information.

My business requirement is the following: "I want to implement event routing based on the sales order type (AUART) and the consumer destination, so that each system receives only the statuses applicable to its scope."

To achieve this via AEM topic subscriptions (wildcards), I need the SalesOrderType / AUART field to be present in the Header / Topic, not just inside the data payload.

  1. I attempted to extend the standard event (sap.s4.beh.salesorder.v1.SalesOrder.Created.v1) using a Metadata Extension to apply the @event.context.attribute annotation. However, the underlying standard RAP BO (R_SALESORDERTP / D_SalesOrderCreated) does not have the @Metadata.allowExtensions: true annotation, which blocks this approach.
  2. I also considered creating a custom RAP Event from scratch, but I've failed so far and did not find a good tutorial to help me on this.

My Questions:

  1. What is the recommended Clean Core compliant approach to promote a payload field (SalesOrderType) into the Header?

  2. Is it recommended to use BAdIs to intercept and enrich the header dynamically before it is dispatched? Or would it be more appropriate to create a custom event using the classic BOR approach?

Any advice, insights, or documentation references would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Prerequisites for Implementing Event-Driven Custom Workflow in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (Real Estate
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud where we need to implement a custom workflow for Real Estate Contract creation, which is not covered by standard workflows.

The expected behavior is:

  • When a Real Estate Contract is created in S/4HANA Cloud
  • A workflow should be automatically triggered
  • The process should go through approval steps in SAP Build Process Automation
  • Then perform follow-up actions (notifications / updates via API)

Based on my understanding, this may require an event-driven architecture using SAP BTP services.

However, I would like to clarify the exact prerequisites and recommended SAP architecture before implementation.

❓ Questions:

  1. What are the mandatory prerequisites to enable Business Events from SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for this scenario?
  2. Is scope item 1NN – Business Event Handling required in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Real Estate Contract events?
  3. Is SAP Event Mesh mandatory, or can SAP Build Process Automation directly consume S/4HANA events without Event Mesh?
  4. Are there standard Business Events available for Real Estate Contract creation? If yes, could you please share the event names or documentation?
  5. If no standard event exists, what is the recommended SAP approach (Clean Core compliant) to achieve this requirement?
  6. What are the required BTP services and subscriptions (SAP Build Process Automation, Event Mesh, Integration Suite, etc.)?
  7. Are there specific Communication Arrangements / APIs that must be activated in S/4HANA Cloud?
  8. Are there any SAP best practices or reference architectures for implementing this type of scenario?

🎯 Objective:

The goal is to ensure that we follow SAP recommended architecture (Clean Core + Event-driven approach) and avoid unnecessary custom development inside S/4HANA.

Any guidance, official documentation, or reference architecture would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.
